---
title: Heterogeneity and Age Structure
format:
    html:
        page-layout: full
metadata-files:
  - metadata/matthewferrari.yml
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/e/2PACX-1vRGx4xBxcrXVv9unCfn1m-n6q8wFaaXkYCEUNnIELCF7dS0R1RYviGrwwJv30IMww/pubembed?start=false&loop=false&delayms=3000" frameborder="0" width="1023" height="606" allowfullscreen="true" mozallowfullscreen="true" webkitallowfullscreen="true"></iframe>
```

[Download slides as PDF](./slides/L04_Age-structure.pptx.pdf)
